header.title: Ferro Docks and Nordwind Ferries sign maintenance contract

gold.name: Ferro Docks
claims: Ferro Docks is a ship-repair yard in Trieste.
Ferro Docks signed a three-year maintenance contract with Nordwind Ferries on 9 March 2026.
Ferro Docks will remain the sole Mediterranean maintenance site for Nordwind Ferries' ice-class fleet.

gold.name: Nordwind Ferries
claims: Nordwind Ferries is headquartered in Kiel.
Nordwind Ferries operates eleven routes on the Baltic Sea.
Nordwind Ferries signed a three-year maintenance contract with Ferro Docks on 9 March 2026.
Nordwind Ferries will base two of its vessels at Ferro Docks' dry dock each winter.
Nordwind Ferries will fund an apprentice welding program at Ferro Docks through 2028.
